# Fixture: only_seeing_one_company
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 11.0s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Andrea! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I did finish the orientation
Concierge: You're all set — you can start picking up shifts now! Open the Shifts tab to see what's available.
Partner: All I am seeing is Circle K

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
The types of shifts available depend on your location and the companies we work with in your area. Keep checking the Shifts tab — new shifts from different companies are added regularly.
